observation: Scribe R9 opened. Primary field covers R9 methodology, Eyewitness benchmark (R10 cross-vendor), and the canonical preload (r9v2_base.md). Witnesses prompt-engineering (Level 2) and empirical-validation (Level 3) for cross-validation with Scribe BRIDLE and Scribe Landing respectively.

SCEV-1 (Scribes Cathedral Empirical Validation) scoped B116 for K437 dispatch. Three-arm test: COLD (question only) vs HOT-base (question + r9v2_base.md) vs HOT-cathedral (question + r9v2_base.md + Scribe tablets). 50 questions × 3 conditions × 2 models (Haiku 4.5 + Opus 4.7) = 300 graded calls, ~$3-5 budget. Key distinction from Eyewitness R10: SCEV-1 measures *cross-session continuity* (Scribes' unique value), not just within-session accuracy. Pass criterion: HOT-cathedral accuracy lift ≥5pp over HOT-base with subscore showing widening gap for older-session questions. Marketing claim on landing page (Chapter 3 teaser) held until SCEV-1 results land.

K435 Phase C (Multilingual Eyewitness probe) landed with PASS on Mellon core claim: Mean ES-HOT 96.7% / Mean EN-HOT 94.5% / Gap +2.2pp (within 10pp threshold, above 85% criterion). PROBE INCOMPLETE — budget cap ($20) hit at call 802/1200 during ES Opus Q52. ES gpt-4o-mini and ES gemini-2.5-flash did not run. ES Haiku scored 93.3% (75 Qs, reliable); ES Opus scored 100% on 52/75 Qs (statistically suspicious — flag for re-verification). Marketing claim 'multilingual parity' is empirically defensible for Anthropic but cross-vendor generalization is not yet demonstrated on ES. K435-continuation probe recommended: complete missing 398 calls (~$2 estimated) before expanding Mellon claim to 4-vendor language-indifference.
canonical_ref: r10_cross_vendor/results multilingual probe + K435 Knight report

observation: MATH TEST 1 LANDED. Bushel 35 nine-track Beyond Colossus run on Collatz Conjecture. Headline empirical finding: SIX of EIGHT independent flagships (Pawn sonar-reasoning-pro x4, Rook Gemini 3.1 Pro x3, Bishop Opus 4.7, Knight GPT 5.5) INDEPENDENTLY converged on the 2-adic Bernoulli-shift conjugacy as the canonical Collatz substrate. Master Object 𝓜 = (ℤ₂, T̃, Φ_T, σ_shift, μ_Haar, R_σ, Σ, 𝓒). The convergence is emergent, not coordinated — six tracks (T1, T2, T4, T5, T6, T7) named the same mathematical primitive through different functorial restrictions in their own native domain language. T8 (Bishop Logic+Proof Theory) and T9 (Knight Lean/Coq) attached as logical and verification interfaces. T3 (Pawn Combinatorics) refused on prompt-injection grounds — substrate-empirical track-level guardrail variance, framing-driven; Bishop substitution recovered T3 symmetry. Substrate spend: $0.057 (Pawn). Bushel 35 thesis CONFIRMED at receipt-publishable strength: the cross-domain reasoning SCAFFOLD itself, not any individual track, is the Crown-Jewel-class invention. Patent-defensible. Eight-by-eight composition matrix of typed cross-track handshakes = the Pheromone substrate edge set. Receipt at BISHOP_DROPZONE/04_KnightReports/MATH_TEST_1_FULL_NINE_TRACK_RECEIPT_BP026.md.
